insertion_plan.description: DROP TABLE safety lines for #bRanked, #bSlots, #LineBreakdown, and #recon_temp added to the cleanup block at the top of the script
insertion_plan.anchor_snippet: IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#StepFinal') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #StepFinal

insertion_plan.description: #bRanked temp table (ROW_NUMBER ranks for OP_Default as the only MAX/SUM category) + SELECT INTO #LineBreakdown (no #bSlots needed — no WINDOW_REDUCTION categories exist). Source is #Step2 (line-level pricing table). Joined to #Step4 (hierarchy/suppression table). OP_Default is the sole category; classified as SUM in AGGREGATE_ENC (#Step3_1 and #Step3_2 both use MAX, but at encounter level there is only one category and no suppression IIF chain — #Step4 passes OP_Default straight through, so all matching lines pay). BundledByNCCI hardcoded to 0 (no NCCI bundle step exists). Quantity confirmed present in #Step2 column list.
Price_Breakdown_Detail correlated subquery added as the last column in the FINAL_JOIN SELECT, immediately before the INTO #Step7 clause

Auditor Query 1 (full line-level detail SELECT from #LineBreakdown) + INSERT INTO [Automation].[dbo].[LineBreakdown_Results] + Query 2 (reconciliation: SUM(LinePayment) per EncounterID from #LineBreakdown vs Price in #Step5) appended after the final OUTPUT SELECT statements
insertion_plan.anchor_snippet:
Select [Status], count(*)
From #StepFinal
Group by [Status]
order by count(*) desc
